name: media_update
description: Update the metadata (name, alternative text, caption) for an existing uploaded file.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the file to update.

parameters.name: fileInfo
parameters.description: JSON object with metadata to update: alternativeText, caption, name.

request_example.body: FormData with 'fileInfo' field: {"alternativeText": "Updated alt text", "caption": "Updated caption"}
